title: Alternative Shader
description: Lightweight pseudo-shader, that almostly fully rewrites FSH and GLSL graphic
body:
# Alternative Shader [AS]
AS is a powerful, but lightweight resourcepack, that almost fully rewrites minecraft's graphic code ([GLSL](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/OpenGL_Shading_Language)) to get incredible look with minimum performance impact, with a support of every block/entity from any mod that you can think of

AS Works completely on **client** and doesn't require any mod, only using **Core Shaders**
## Installation Guide
This is resourcepack, that **doesn't require any mods**, so you just need to drag it into texturepack folder on 1.21.1 and turn on fabulous

**Warning**: Officially AS distributed ONLY on modrinth, i do not recommend downloading it from any other source

[![Download on Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70a9a5e371d438b76c66e3f70296f91e4b20cd21.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alternative-shader/versions)

![after\before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7136d068f904c256bd614590a3c3c629c08d078b.jpeg)
## This Resourcepack (Vanilla Shader) includes
- Generating PseudoPBR in Real Time
- Light Pathfinding (kind of, obviously only imitation)
- Realistic shadows
- Brighter graphics
### And much more!
# Known Issues
- Incompatibility with [sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and other mods, that changes minecraft rendering, or doesn't support Core Shaders
### Recommendations
- Highly recommended to use **Fabulous**, Fast or Fancy would break some parts (Only to 2.0+ Versions)
- Recommended to use AS with **more than 8 render distance**

## What will be in 2.7
**2.7** will be one of the biggest updates yet, including
- ~~Huge bugfixes, almost every glitch will be fixed~~ (2.6.8)
- ~~Full code rewrite, no more legacy code~~ (2.6.8)
- ~~Huge optimizations~~ (2.6.8)
- Dynamically generating bloom
- Dynamically generating gloss
### Coming soon! (Taking a bit longer, than expected)


## About developing 
**AS Is completely enthusiasm powered**



I do **not** get any revenue from AS, so it can be archived at any moment
